findings.issue: 12 page breaks — likely excessive
findings.fix: Only call add_page_break() before major sections 1–5.

findings.issue: Body paragraph_format.space_after is 0 — reads dense
findings.fix: Set styles['Normal'].paragraph_format.space_after = Pt(6) in build_templates.py.

findings.issue: 11 body paragraph(s) start with hand-typed bullet glyphs
findings.fix: Use d.add_paragraph(text, style='List Bullet') instead of typed •/■/▸.

findings.issue: Section 'Staffing Plan and Position Qualifications' is 63 sentences (over target 20-40)
findings.fix: Trim section content by ~23 sentences; per RFP rubric the over-length material may be excised from evaluation.

findings.issue: Section 'Relevant Experience and Past Performance' is 14 sentences (under target 30-60)
findings.fix: Expand section content with 16 more substantive sentences.
